title: assistant-review Skill Behavior Eval Fixtures
description: Provider-neutral offline eval cases for the assistant-review skill's autonomous review-fix loop.
recommended_use: Run each case with the assistant-review skill instructions loaded.
Compare the local response against the review loop entry, findings, fix, validate, and exit contracts.
Use deterministic substring checks as offline proxies for contract adherence, not semantic grading.

cases.title: Review-fix loop handles findings
cases.purpose: Checks that review-fix mode resolves all must-fix and should-fix findings, validates, and continues to re-review instead of stopping after one pass.
cases.prompt: Review the current uncommitted changes and fix all issues you find before reporting back.
setup_context: The assistant-review skill instructions are active.
The working tree has uncommitted changes in multiple files.
The user did not request audit-only mode.
expected_behavior: Resolves review scope and captures a non-empty review_material_snapshot.
Runs review rounds with confidence thresholds and previously_fixed tracking.
Fixes all must-fix and should-fix findings before validation.
Runs build or test verification before the next round.
Continues review, fix, validate, and re-review until clean or max 5 rounds.
pass_criteria: The response identifies review scope and mode.
The response includes findings with severity and evidence.
The response fixes must-fix and should-fix items or explains explicit deferrals.
The response reports a final result after the loop exits.
fail_signals: Performs only one review pass when findings remain.
Reports findings without fixing them in review-fix mode.
Fixes must-fix items but ignores should-fix items without deferral.
Skips build or test validation after fixes.

cases.title: Medium review requires rubric
cases.purpose: Checks that medium or larger review scopes require rubric scores, threshold action, and a single final summary after loop exit.
cases.prompt: Run a fresh review on this medium-sized feature branch. Do not interrupt me with intermediate findings; just finish the loop.
setup_context: The assistant-review skill instructions are active.
The user asks for a fresh review and does not request audit-only mode.
expected_behavior: Requires rubric scores for correctness, code quality, architecture, security, and test coverage.
Applies a weighted score threshold action such as PASS, REFINE, or PIVOT.
Uses increasing confidence thresholds across rounds.
Buffers intermediate round details and presents one final summary after loop exit.
Includes score progression when multiple rounds occur.
Does not ask the user between rounds unless blocked.
pass_criteria: The response includes rubric dimensions and weighted score.
The response applies the threshold action to decide exit or refinement.
The response mentions confidence thresholds or round progression.
The response produces a single final summary.
The response does not pause between rounds for approval.
fail_signals: Omits rubric scores for medium scope.
Prints intermediate findings as final results before loop exit.
Asks the user whether to continue between rounds.
Exits clean while must-fix or should-fix findings remain.
